entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the target crop for drought tolerance improvement

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to maintain productivity under water-limited conditions

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Water deficit imposed on the crop, particularly at the pod filling stage

entities.name: POD FILLING STAGE
entities.description: A critical growth stage in groundnut where drought stress significantly impacts yield

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Region where drought stress is a major yield constraint for groundnut

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where drought stress is a major yield constraint for groundnut

entities.name: MAGIC LINES
entities.description: Multi-parent Advanced Generation Inter-Cross population used for breeding

entities.name: LEASYSCAN
entities.description: A high throughput phenotyping platform (HTPP) used to assess canopy growth

entities.name: CANOPY GROWTH
entities.description: The development and expansion of the plant canopy, measured early in growth

entities.name: MANAGED STRESS ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: Controlled environment using drip lines to apply uniform water stress

entities.name: TIME DOMAIN REFLECTOMETRY
entities.description: TDR probes used to measure soil moisture levels

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The amount of water held in the soil, monitored during drought imposition

entities.name: MEAN SCORE INDEX
entities.description: An index combining productivity and resilience to select drought tolerant lines

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY INDEX
entities.description: An index used to measure the productivity of lines under stress

entities.name: RESILIENCE INDEX
entities.description: An index used to measure the resilience of lines under stress

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the canopy's leaf area per unit ground area

entities.name: DIGITAL BIOMASS
entities.description: Biomass estimated through digital phenotyping platforms

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the groundnut crop
